nl_query: Count active script assignments per evaluator.
failed_sql:
SELECT ea.evaluator_user_id, au.display_name, COUNT(*) AS active_assignments
FROM   script_assignment sa
JOIN   app_user au ON au.id = sa.faculty_cache_id
WHERE  sa.is_active = TRUE
GROUP  BY ea.evaluator_user_id, au.display_name
ORDER  BY active_assignments DESC
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): unaliased.evaluator_user_id, unaliased.evaluator_user_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
